text: WWC Check Renewal Receipt Application Number: E0041454 Name: MR KIRAN NARULA Date: 01/03/2017 Payment: $83.00 Notice for Department for Child Protection and Family Support WA (ABN 41 889 424 592): This receipt is proof that the named person has applied for a Working with Children Assessment Notice (Card) and may start or continue in child-related work while the application is being processed. The application number can be used to confirm whether the application is in process via our website workingwithchildren.wa.gov.au Penalties of $60,000 and 5 years imprisonment apply if a person undertakes child related work where: (i) the application has been withdrawn; (ii) an Interim Negative Notice or Negative Notice prohibits child-related work; or (iii) the person has been convicted for a Class 1 Offence committed as an adult.
